overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating a futuristic car through heavy rain and fog at night. The player drives through neon-lit urban highways, tunnels with red ambient lighting, and commercial districts with large billboards, transitioning between districts like Wells Springs, Coastview, and Arroyo.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway approaching tunnel entrance

events.description: vehicle accelerates from 44 to 63 km/h approaching tunnel entrance
ambient lighting shifts to red as vehicle enters tunnel zone

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the highway through heavy rain and fog, approaching a tunnel entrance

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure spanning the multi-lane highway
large illuminated advertisement with red and white neon lighting
tall pole-mounted lights illuminating the road through the fog
green holographic navigation marker displaying WELLS SPRINGS

segments.scene_description: Driving through a rainy, foggy night in the Wells Springs district, accelerating along a multi-lane highway toward a tunnel entrance. Neon billboards and street lights pierce through the heavy fog as the vehicle gains speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with red ambient lighting

events.description: vehicle enters enclosed tunnel with red neon ambient lighting
vehicle overtakes a blue car while maintaining high speed through tunnel

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through the enclosed tunnel, passing other vehicles in the red-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: silver car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: enclosed concrete tunnel with curved ceiling and red ambient lighting
red neon strip lights running along the tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow enclosed tunnel bathed in red ambient light, sheltered from the rain. The vehicle maintains high speed while overtaking other cars in the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway commercial district with heavy fog

events.description: exits tunnel into open highway with heavy fog and reduced visibility
passing through commercial area with bright illuminated billboards on both sides

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed through foggy open highway conditions, passing commercial billboards and buildings

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving in the adjacent right lane

entered.detail: large illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements
double-headed street lamps casting yellow light through the heavy fog
futuristic commercial structures with bright facade lighting visible through fog
highway signage indicating upcoming exit ramps

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into an open commercial highway district engulfed in heavy fog. The vehicle passes bright illuminated billboards and futuristic commercial buildings while maintaining speed through the misty conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with exit ramps entering Coastview and Arroyo districts

events.description: vehicle slows down while navigating highway interchange curves and exit ramps
navigation sign indicates entering COASTVIEW district
navigation sign indicates entering ARROYO district

agents.ego_description: slowing down and navigating through highway interchange curves, following navigation signs through Coastview toward Arroyo

entered.detail: complex highway junction with multiple ramps and overpass structures
holographic navigation marker displaying COASTVIEW district name
metal safety barriers lining the curved highway ramps
elevated highway crossing above the current road level
holographic navigation marker displaying ARROYO district name

segments.scene_description: Navigating a complex highway interchange with multiple curves and ramps, transitioning from Coastview into Arroyo district. The vehicle slows down while following the winding road lined with guard rails and overpass structures, passing district navigation signs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive through a rainy, neon-lit metropolis that transitions from open highways into a claustrophobic tunnel and back into a sprawling commercial district. It begins in the foggy Wells Springs district, accelerating along a multi-lane highway where neon billboards pierce through the heavy mist. As the vehicle enters a narrow enclosed tunnel, the environment shifts abruptly to a rain-sheltered corridor bathed in intense red ambient light. The scene then opens back into the heavy fog of a commercial highway, passing illuminated futuristic buildings before turning into a complex interchange of winding ramps and overpasses. Finally, the vehicle slows as it navigates the curving guard rails and district signs, transitioning from Coastview into the Arroyo district.
